questionHtml:
A compound with Mr = 102 contains 58.8 % carbon, 9.80 % hydrogen and 31 % oxygen by mass.
What is its molecular formula?

Ar: C = 12.0; H = 1.0; O = 16.0

A. C2H14O4

B. C3H4O4

C. C5H10O2

D. C6H14O

meta.title: A compound with Mr = 102 contains 58.8 % carbon, 9.80 % hydrogen and 31 % oxygen by mass.What is its molecular formula? Ar: C = 12.0; H = 1.0; O = 16.0 A. C2H14O4 B. C3H4O4 C. C5H1
